---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new KPI, command, department, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description
What would you like to add or change?

## Use Case
Who benefits and how? (e.g., "Analysts need to track X for council briefings")

## Department / Track
Which department(s) or command track(s) does this relate to?

## Proposed Approach
How might this be implemented? (optional)

## Additional Context
Links to benchmarks, data sources, or examples from other jurisdictions.
